_comment_scenario_ids: List of scenario IDs to monitor and record
_comment_max_parallel_recordings: Maximum number of games to record simultaneously
_comment_max_parallel_updates: Maximum number of concurrent update threads
_comment_max_parallel_first_updates: Maximum number of concurrent first-time updates
_comment_scan_interval: Seconds between scans for new games
_comment_output_dir: Directory for response and game state files
_comment_output_metadata_dir: Optional separate directory for metadata files (null to use output_dir)
_comment_enabled_scanning: Whether to scan for new games
_comment_max_guest_games_per_account: Maximum guest games per account (null for no limit)
_comment_long_term_storage_path: Path for rotating large response files (null to disable)
_comment_file_size_threshold: Size in bytes to trigger file rotation (only with long_term_storage_path)
_comment_registry_path: Path to the recording registry JSON file
